creator: luigi@prova.iet.unipi.it
text:
the tk-4.1.tgz package seems to miss the shared lib. Plus,
	tar gives a "skipping to next header..." message while
	extracting, which is suspicious.

	The package was fetched from ftp.uk.freebsd.org and has size
	1222611 bytes and checksum

	MD5 (tk-4.1.tgz) = a37279f4a12c76e7404cdf86ee4096b5
